ddls:
CREATE TABLE "healthcare_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each indicator */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the indicator */,
  "shortname" TEXT /* Short name of the indicator */,
  "code" TEXT /* Code for the indicator */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the indicator */,
  "numerator" TEXT /* Numerator for the indicator (e.g., number of treatment courses) */,
  "denominator" TEXT /* Denominator for the indicator (e.g., total number of cases) */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the indicator (e.g., percentage, numerator only) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the indicator was last updated */,
  "uid" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the indicator */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the indicator (e.g., disease treatment, patient care, healthcare coverage) */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Metadata related to the indicator (e.g., data quality, collection methods) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the indicator */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the indicator */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the indicator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_healthcare_indicators_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_healthcare_indicators_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_healthcare_indicators_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indicator_values" (
  "value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each value */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the indicator the value belongs to */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the indicator */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the value was recorded */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the geographical location */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the value */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the value */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicator_values_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicator_values_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicator_values_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES healthcare_indicators ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicator_values_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicator_values_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES geographical_locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role mapping */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the data source was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the data source was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geographical_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geographical location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the geographical location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the geographical location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the geographical location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the geographical location */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the location was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the location was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)
